MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES IS GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGE ALLEGATIONS UNLESS AND UNTIL PLAINTIFF COMPLIES WITH C C P 425.13 OTHERWISE MOOT.
